title: Statistics for Marketing
shortSummary: The quantitative foundation for every data-driven marketing decision — from understanding averages to knowing when an A/B test result is real.
whyItMatters: Descriptive statistics, statistical significance, correlation vs causation, sample sizes, and regression analysis are the maths behind marketing decisions. Without this foundation, marketers mistake noise for signal.
coreConcepts: Descriptive statistics (mean, median, mode, standard deviation)
Confidence intervals and why they matter
